prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (M177 DE40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, custom 4-inch titanium downpipes, and a Weistec high-flow intercooler with billet end tanks for sustained 850+ WHP on E85 fuel

Full Motordyne Engineering 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with 409-grade mandrel-bent tubing, quad 102mm titanium tips, and a bypass valve delete for aggressive M177 soundtrack, paired with a custom ECU flash via HP Tuners with optimized ignition timing and fuel maps for 93 octane and E85 flex-fuel capability

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, 8-position rebound adjustment, and camber-adjustable top mounts, paired with H&R Monoball front subframe bushings and a Weistec Engineering carbon fiber front strut brace to eliminate chassis flex under hard cornering
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for W205 C63 AMG, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated canards, rear overfenders with aggressive flares, and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for quad tips

Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged 20x9.5 ET25 and 20x11 ET45 wheels in gloss black with brushed lip, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear) for maximum grip, paired with AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm two-piece rotors

AMG Carbon Fiber Engine Cover with custom laser-etched M177 engine code, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional central vent and heat extractor, finished with a matte vinyl wrap in Selenite Grey with a satin clear coat for UV protection
